## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format .` reports no changes
- [ ] `dart analyze` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] `dart test` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior or the public API changed
- [ ] Change fits the local-first, no-upload design direction in
      [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
